mapper.insert: INSERT INTO membership (org_id, user_id, role, joined_at) VALUES (#{orgId}, #{userId}, #{role}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email FROM membership m INNER JOIN users u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE m.org_id = #{orgId} AND m.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT m.*, u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email FROM membership m INNER JOIN users u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE m.org_id = #{orgId} ORDER BY m.joined_at
SELECT m.*, u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email FROM membership m INNER JOIN users u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE m.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE membership SET role = #{role} WHERE org_id = #{orgId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM membership WHERE org_id = #{orgId} AND user_id = #{userId}
